subject: Kikaonde
coverageNote: Form directories exist only where teaching-module source PDFs were ingested. Missing forms must resolve as known-gap, not empty objects.

lesson.title: Bafunda bashimikile bishimi bipibipi bibiji.
topics: Kutanchika mingilo ya biñambwañambwa kubiwe mo kyafwainwa.
Luteleka ku bishimpi. Nemba bishite bisantu.
